xbk5ssbYSx7VqRp9H4Ux1CY4uQM4b9N"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/StorageSlot.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcf74f855663ce2ae00ed8352666b7935f6cddea2932fdf2c3ecd30a9b1cd0e97","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9f660b1f351b757dfe01438e59888f31f33ded3afcf5cb5b0d9bf9aa6f320a8b","dweb:/ipfs/QmarDJ5hZEgBtCmmrVzEZWjub9769eD686jmzb2XpSU1cM"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8891738ffe910f0cf2da09566928589bf5d63f4524dd734fd9cedbac3274dd5c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://971f954442df5c2ef5b5ebf1eb245d7105d9fbacc7386ee5c796df1d45b21617","dweb:/ipfs/QmadRjHbkicwqwwh61raUEapaVEtaLMcYbQZWs9gUkgj3u"]},"src/core/PerpsVault.sol":{"keccak256":"0x88372f33e6381dfb2e9ef9e2182702234afda1e41be67f39d0b6b4bd91e0e375","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://be91c390c44fec58c62ca306975ac912f2f6fbcd9e2ccf7eb7287c80b09806c2","dweb:/ipfs/Qmf76fpW4PqB7QWmHxoGx6eG5RuL42qYy8KiyqgMr6MdmR"]},"src/errors/PerpsErrors.sol":{"keccak256":"0x4020220bccb7408c58fb49dde45d119c73c971dac18f0da53695b0c7270da6cb","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://be697bdc018cc6a9cfb88b2d3748a7a82187278721873dceb6d475d79d341b51","dweb:/ipfs/QmavLagBMDXDE7RfZmN7ZTFwU8BWqjjgX3bQX5h15oYy5q"]}},"version":1}

addLiquidity(uint256).details: The first liquidity provider must deposit more than the minimum liquidity to prevent excessive share dilution.  Subsequent providers receive shares proportional to their contribution relative to the total pool.

constructor.details: The constructor initializes the vault with the specified asset and sets up necessary parameters for liquidity management and collateral handling. It ensures that the provided asset address is valid and determines the appropriate scaling factor based on the asset's decimals to maintain consistent 18-decimal precision internally.

deposit(uint256).details: Collateral is scaled to 18 decimals internally for consistent calculations, regardless of the underlying asset's decimals.

lockCollateral(address,uint256).details: This function is called by the Position Manager during position opening and is not exposed to users directly.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pause().details: Pausing functions are included as a safety mechanism to halt operations in case of emergencies or detected vulnerabilities.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

removeLiquidity(uint256).details: Withdraws the underlying asset based on the share of the pool owned by the LP. Ensures that the vault has        sufficient liquidity to fulfill the withdrawal.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

settleTrade(address,uint256,int256).details: FIXED: Made robust against LP front-running insolvency traps by ensuring physical payouts are prioritized over strict LP internal accounting.

transferByManager(address,address,uint25.details: Updates global accounting to maintain invariant consistency  (sum of all trader balances == totalTraderFreeCollateral).

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

unlockCollateral(address,uint256).details: Effectively moves locked funds back to user's available balance.

unpause().details: Unpausing allows the contract to resume normal operations after being paused.

withdraw(uint256).details: Only allows withdrawal of collateral that is not currently locked in positions. FIXED: Dust sweeping vulnerability prevented by strict modulo check.

ASSET().notice: The ERC20 token accepted as collateral (e.g., USDC).

DECIMALS_SCALAR().notice: Multiplier to scale the asset's native decimals to 18 decimals.

addLiquidity(uint256).notice: Deposits assets into the liquidity pool and mints LP shares.

lockCollateral(address,uint256).notice: Locks trader collateral when opening a position.

positionManager().notice: The authorized trading engine contract address.

removeLiquidity(uint256).notice: Burns LP shares to withdraw proportional liquidity.

setPositionManager(address).notice: Sets the Position Manager contract address, which is responsible for managing positions and interacting with the vault for collateral and PnL settlements.

settleTrade(address,uint256,int256).notice: Finalizes a trade by releasing collateral and applying realized PnL.

totalLiquidity().notice: The "Source of Truth" for protocol liquidity (the House's money).

totalLockedCollateral().notice: Total amount of collateral across all users that is currently locked in positions.

totalLpShares().notice: The total supply of LP shares currently issued by the protocol.

totalTraderFreeCollateral().notice: Global sum of all free collateral currently held by traders in the vault.

transferByManager(address,address,uint25.notice: Moves collateral between users (used for Liquidation Fees).

unlockCollateral(address,uint256).notice: Unlocks collateral for a cancelled limit order.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Withdraws free collateral from the vault.
